history.1.0.0: Initial release. Loads all platforms, registers async_reload_entry listener.
history.1.0.1: Added _slugify() helper. Stores remote_entity and media_player_entity in hass.data derived from tv_name so all platforms use correct entity IDs regardless of the name chosen during setup. Previously hardcoded to remote.homekit_tv / media_player.homekit_tv.
history.1.0.2: async_reload_entry now skips reload when only homekit_inputs, debug_listen, or debug_send change. Previously any options write triggered a full reload which recreated all switch instances with fresh empty options, immediately wiping the homekit_inputs write after an Include switch was toggled. Now only custom_inputs changes trigger a reload.
history.1.0.3: Fixed reload guard bug introduced in 1.0.2. The prev is not None check meant the guard never fired on the first options write after a fresh install or restart (prev always None), so every Include switch toggle still triggered a full reload and wiped the homekit_inputs write. Now stores current before comparing and also skips reload when prev is None and custom_inputs is empty.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. ReloadHomeKitButton, TestCommandButton (reads remote entity ID from hass.data), AddCustomInputButton, DeleteCustomInputButton.
history.1.1.0: AddCustomInputButton reads AppleTVAppSwitch state. When ON and command type is media_player, saves command_type=media_player_source so media_player.py uses select_source instead of play_media.
history.1.2.0: AddCustomInputButton reads AppleTVInputSwitch state. When ON and command_type is media_player_source, embeds HAP identifier as |input_N third segment in command string. Graceful degradation if HAP Identifier field is empty.
history.1.3.0: Added NextSavedInputButton (Next Saved Input, CONFIG category). Reads media_player_entity_ref from hass.data and calls _cycle_custom_inputs() directly — same logic and shared index counter as the iOS remote Info button.
history.1.4.0: DeleteCustomInputButton now also removes the deleted input name from options[homekit_inputs] so no stale entries remain after deletion. NextSavedInputButton warning message updated to mention the Include switches. AddCustomInputButton log message now reminds user to enable the Include switch after saving.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. One-step setup flow: scans entity registry for homekit_controller media_player entities, presents dropdown and tv_name field, creates config entry.
Initial release. Bridges iOS HomeKit remote key events to HAP commands. Reads entity IDs from hass.data instead of hardcoding.
history.1.1.0: Added media_player_source command_type in _execute_input_command. Uses select_source instead of play_media — required for Apple TV app launching.
history.1.2.0: _execute_input_command for media_player_source supports optional third |input_N segment. When present, sends HAP input switch to remote entity before calling select_source, automatically switching the TV HDMI input.
history.1.3.0: Stores self in hass.data[media_player_entity_ref] during async_added_to_hass so NextSavedInputButton in button.py can call _cycle_custom_inputs() directly. Both the iOS Info button and the device page button share the same _current_input_index.
history.1.4.0: Added _included_inputs() helper that filters custom_inputs to those listed in options[homekit_inputs]. source_list now returns only included inputs — excluded inputs are invisible to HomeKit and HA. _cycle_custom_inputs() cycles only included inputs and resets the index to 0 if it goes out of range after an exclusion.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. Core HAP communication layer. Connects to TV via homekit_controller pairing, scans for RemoteKey/Active/VolumeSelector/ActiveIdentifier/Mute characteristics, polls and subscribes to ActiveIdentifier, dispatches all HAP commands.
Initial release. InputTypeSelectEntity dropdown populated from all remote.* and media_player.* entities in HA. Selected value stored in-memory only, resets to hap on reload.
Initial release. Creates one SavedInputSensor per entry in custom_inputs. Orphan cleanup on every reload removes sensor entities whose unique_id no longer matches a saved input.

Initial release. DebugListenSwitch and DebugSendSwitch toggle HOMEKIT_TV_LISTEN / HOMEKIT_TV_SEND log tags live without restart. State persisted to config_entry.options. AppleTVSwitch (1. Apple TV) selects select_source vs play_media for media_player inputs (in-memory only).
history.1.1.0: AppleTVSwitch renamed to AppleTVAppSwitch, label changed from 1. Apple TV to 1. Apple TV App. Added AppleTVInputSwitch (1. Apple TV Input): when ON at save time, button.py embeds the HAP identifier as |input_N in the command string so the TV HDMI input switches automatically before launching an Apple TV app. Both Apple TV switches are in-memory only.
history.1.2.0: Version alignment only — no logic changes from 1.1.0.
history.1.3.0: Added HomeKitInputSwitch: one persistent switch per saved input, named Include: <input name>. Controls whether the input appears in the HomeKit/HA source list and the input cycle. State persisted immediately to options[homekit_inputs] without triggering a reload. Default OFF. Orphan cleanup removes switches for deleted inputs.
history.1.3.1: Fixed HomeKitInputSwitch._update_options stale config entry bug. Previously each switch instance held a snapshot of options from creation time, causing each toggle to overwrite the previous one with the old empty list. Now always fetches the live entry via async_get_entry() so homekit_inputs accumulates correctly across multiple switch toggles.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. ConfigTextEntity fields for input configuration. CurrentIdentifierTextEntity displays active TV input.
history.1.0.1: CurrentIdentifierTextEntity reads remote entity ID from hass.data instead of hardcoding remote.homekit_tv. Fixes current identifier display when tv_name is anything other than Homekit TV.
